sagemaker.devicefleet.edgeoutputconfig.K.Description: The AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key that Amazon SageMaker uses to encrypt data on the storage volume after compilation job. If you don't provide a KMS key ID, Amazon SageMaker uses the default KMS key for Amazon S3 for your role's account.

sagemaker.devicefleet.edgeoutputconfig.S.Description: The Amazon Simple Storage (S3) bucket URI.
